summary: Daily Reports feature (Iteration 91) - Backend 17/17 tests passed, Frontend all flows verified. Fixed missing FileText import in CuisinePage.jsx.
seed_data_creation: Test reports created with TEST_ prefix and unique UUID suffix for cleanup identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Reports feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/daily-reports/draft (create/retrieve draft with auto_summary), POST /api/daily-reports/{id}/observations (update observations on draft), POST /api/daily-reports/{id}/submit (submit report), GET /api/daily-reports (list with filters), GET /api/daily-reports/{id} (detail with comparison). Frontend: CuisinePage has 'Rapport du jour' tab with DailyReportPanel kind='cuisine', CoachJeuxPage has 'Rapport du jour' tab with DailyReportPanel kind='coach_jeux', RecoupementPanel has 'Rapports' tab with DailyReportsList showing submitted reports with detail modal including comparison table.

draft_tests: test_create_cuisine_draft_success - PASSED (auto_summary with items, total_quantity, items_count, scans_count)
test_create_coach_jeux_draft_success - PASSED (auto_summary with items, bons_total, total_quantity, total_revenue)
submit_tests: test_submit_report_success - PASSED (status becomes submitted, submitted_at set)
detail_tests: test_admin_gets_detail_with_comparison - PASSED (comparison with rows, total_declared_qty, total_system_qty, alerts_count)

cuisine_page: Auto-summary stats (Plats préparés, Types de plats, Scans bons) - PASSED
coach_jeux_page: Auto-summary stats (Bons transmis, Parties, Revenus déclarés, Refusés) - PASSED
Detail items (VR 360° x10, Simulateur Course x8) - PASSED
admin_report_detail_modal: Report title with kind, actor_name, date - PASSED
Totaux globaux (Qté déclarée, Qté système, CA déclaré, CA système) - PASSED
Alert banner with écarts count and gap - PASSED

bug_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: FileText is not defined in CuisinePage.jsx
bug_fixed.root_cause: FileText icon from lucide-react and DailyReportPanel component were used but not imported
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added FileText to lucide-react imports and added import for DailyReportPanel component
